title: chlorophytum benguellense
intro: Chlorophytum benguellense, also known as Benguella or Fever Grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asparagaceae. It is native to Angola and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Chlorophytum benguellense is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its essential oil is also extracted for medicinal use.
